items.title: Rocky-shore biodiversity survey
items.summary: A transect survey of intertidal species across a Cornish rocky shore, comparing biodiversity between sheltered and exposed zones.

items.title: Shore crab population study
items.summary: Mark-recapture study estimating the population and size distribution of green shore crabs (Carcinus maenas) in an estuary.

items.title: Seagrass & carbon storage review
items.summary: A literature review on the role of seagrass meadows as blue-carbon habitats and their importance for coastal resilience.
